description: Suresh Raina urged MS Dhoni to play IPL 2027, dismissing concerns about his fitness after CSK's loss.  Fans at Chepauk were emotional, fearing it was Dhoni's last home game.  Despite the defeat, Dhoni's presence and lap of appreciation captivated the crowd, leaving his future uncertain but fueling hope for another season.

CBSE answer sheet portal delay: When will the Class 12 access link go live?
description: Several CBSE Class XII students expressed confusion on social media after the board’s answer sheet access portal failed to activate on May 19 despite an announced application window. Students sought clarity regarding the timing of the link and the distinction between obtaining evaluated answer scripts and applying for re-evaluation. CBSE clarified that re-evaluation applications will open separately from May 26 to May 29. The board also acknowledged that evaluation errors may occur while assessing nearly 1.25 crore answer scripts annually.

Bank manager dies after falling from 15th floor while drying mats in Gurgaon
description: An assistant bank manager tragically died after falling from the 15th floor of a Gurgaon high-rise. The 37-year-old reportedly slipped while drying mats and carpets on the terrace. Preliminary investigations suggest an accidental fall, with police examining CCTV footage.

BJP civic chief offers Rs 1 crore reward for beheading Trinamool MP Saayoni Ghosh
description: A BJP leader in Uttar Pradesh announced a Rs 1 crore reward for beheading a Trinamool Congress MP over an old social media post. The remarks, made during a protest against alleged insult to Hindu deities, have sparked a political row. The MP had previously stated her account was hacked when the post was made.

title: BJP MLA’s mobile phone snatched during morning walk in Raipur
description: A senior BJP leader's phone was snatched in Raipur during a morning walk, sparking a political row over law and order. Police swiftly apprehended a 19-year-old suspect and recovered the device within eight hours. The incident drew criticism from the Congress, which questioned the effectiveness of the city's police commissionerate system amidst rising crime rates.

title: Aaron Rai’s landmark PGA Championship triumph fuelled by humble parental support
Don’t allow bulldozer culture to enter Maharashtra, this is not UP or Bihar: Bombay HC
description: The Bombay High Court's Aurangabad bench criticized the Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation for arbitrarily demolishing properties linked to AIMIM corporator Mateen Patel and resident Hanif Khan. The court noted the violation of Supreme Court guidelines, including the mandatory 15-day notice period, and stated the action rendered families homeless.

title: Elon Musk loses lawsuit against OpenAI and its CEO Sam Altman
'Anil Pandit USA’ to ‘Manna Brampton’: Why new-age gangsters prefer foreign suffix
description: North India's notorious gangsters are shedding village-based aliases for international monikers like 'Fateh Portugal' and 'Manna Brampton'. This shift signals a globalized underworld, using foreign locations for intimidation and to evade local law enforcement.  These 'global franchises' now target celebrities and operate with a transnational reach, posing a significant challenge to policing worldwide.

How soaring crude prices are hitting India: Explained in 10 charts
description: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East are significantly impacting India's economy. Rising crude oil prices have led to a Rs 3 per litre fuel hike, eroded investor wealth by over Rs 5.85 lakh crore, and pushed the rupee to an all-time low. Foreign investors are also withdrawing funds, while the import bill has surged.

title: ‘Tn07 Cm 2026’ scene goes viral: Venkat Prabhu gifts GOAT plate to CM Vijay
description: Director Venkat Prabhu presented Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay with the 'TN07 CM 2026' number plate from the film 'The Greatest of All Time'. This gesture comes after a scene from the 2024 movie, featuring Vijay with the same registration, went viral, with fans now viewing it as a political prediction for the 2026 elections.

title: Anthropic CEO makes a 'doomsday' prediction for software companies
description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei told WSJ at the World Economic Forum in Davos that software is heading toward being "cheap, maybe essentially free," warning that whole careers built around writing code may not survive the AI shift. The Anthropic chief executive also predicted SaaS incumbents leaning on code complexity as a moat could "go bust" as ServiceNow, Snowflake and Microsoft stocks slide and Anthropic eyes a $900 billion valuation.

title: Rai of Hope: Punjab da putt-ar wins PGA title
description: Aaron Rai, a British golfer of Indian heritage, has achieved a historic victory at the 2026 PGA Championship, becoming the first of Indian origin to win a major golf title. His understated precision and remarkable 68-foot birdie putt secured his win against top players, marking a significant moment for Indian golf and diaspora success.
